center.name: 瓦亞納德縣
center.summary: 瓦亞納德縣是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Greater flameback、白胸噪鹛、灰颈噪鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: socialis, recorded in Wayanad district, Kerala]] This flameback is a species associated with a diversity of rather open forest habitat, such as found in the foothills of the Himalayas or in the Western Ghats; it also inhabits mangrove forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the past the species was considered to have two subspecies, the nominate form in the Nilgiris (earlier called the black-chinned laughingthrush or rufous-breasted laughingthrush) and jerdoni (which is now treated as a full species, the Banasura laughingthrush) with a grey upper breast and found in the Brahmagiris of Coorg and Banasura range of Wayanad

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Within this range, fragmented populations are found at Banasura Hill in Wayanad, Chembra Peak, and Vellarimala. The Banasura laughingthrush is primarily found in shola habitat between 1,400 and 2,400 meters in elevation
